title: Moroccan Grilled Flank Steak
description: A flavorful and spicy grilled flank steak recipe inspired by Moroccan cuisine. Best served with a side of couscous or rice.

ingredients.name: Moroccan spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Moroccan spice blend, red pepper flakes, and garlic.
Rub the spice mixture all over the flank steak, making sure to coat it evenly.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
Meanwhile, cook the couscous according to package instructions.
To serve, slice the steak and place it on top of the couscous. Drizzle with lemon juice and serve immediately.
Optional: serve with additional Moroccan spice blend for added flavor.
